title: Doom 3: BFG Edition

notes: Doom 3 BFG worked absolutely flawless out of the box.  High frames at 1440P with no artifacts, stutters, or crashes.  Frame rate was as good as playing on Windows.  I played the first hour on Windows and Ubuntu Mint and saw zero difference between the two.
title: Doom 3: BFG Edition

notes: This game run perfectly with this parameter " MESA_GL_VERSION_OVERRIDE=4.5COMPAT allow_glsl_builtin_variable_redeclaration=true force_glsl_extensions_warn=true PROTON_NO_ESYNC=1 %command%"
title: Doom 3: BFG Edition

notes:
I've finally found a way to play this game without crashes on Doom 3. 
Use the command: MESA_GL_VERSION_OVERRIDE=4.5COMPAT allow_glsl_builtin_variable_redeclaration=true force_glsl_extensions_warn=true  PROTON_USE_WINED3D=1 %command%.
Using PROTON_NO_ESYNC=1 is the main cause of crashing after loading Doom 3.
title: Doom 3: BFG Edition

notes: No amount of tweaking or updating has gotten me past an empty window that immediately crashes back to the desktop.

notes:
First boot wouldn't work on proton version 4.x-x, but it did on 3.16-9 then it would boot on 4.2-7 afterwards. So try that if you are having issues.

Performance seems to be good, and sound issues may be resolved by downgrading proton version to 3.16-9 (or potentially 3.16-4), though I did not experience it with 4.2-7.
